title: Medication Order Authenticity Cannot Be Verified
scenario: A medication order exists, but the system cannot verify that the order is authentic before administration.
initial_state: The medication order was present during authorization.
state_transition: Order authenticity verification fails before execution.
execution_boundary: Medication administration is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires verified authenticity of the clinical order supporting administration.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the medication order cannot be verified as authentic.
proof_conclusion: Medication execution must fail closed when order authenticity cannot be verified.
clinical_action: Administer medication based on unverifiable order
